creator: grembo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to James Wright from comment #3)

You can see how official versions relate to jitsi-meet versions here:

https://github.com/jitsi/jitsi-meet-release-notes/blob/master/CHANGELOG-WEB.md

The current versions are:

    2.0.7287 (2022-05-09)
    jitsi-meet 1.0.6155

As acm@ doesn't seem to have the bandwidth to work on this, I'll try to update jitsi-meet and jitsi-videobridge locally - and if it works out - will also push the changes to ports.
